text: Last class I made a reservation and reported what the hotel said about the booking.
Today I want to order a meal at a restaurant and ask for things in a polite way.

I would like the steak well-done, please.
Good evening. Could you bring the menu, please? And could you tell me what todays special is?
Of course. Here you are. Tonights special is the grilled salmon, and our vegetarian pasta is also very popular.
Would you mind checking if the pasta dish has nuts? My friend is allergic. For me, I would like the steak well-done, please.
No problem at all. I will check the pasta with the kitchen. One steak, well-done. Would you like any dessert with that?
Yes, the apple pie, please. And could you tell me if the service charge is already included in the bill?
Yes, a ten percent service charge is included, so there is no need to leave extra. I will bring your order right away. Enjoy your evening!
Would you mind checking if this is vegetarian?
I am allergic to nuts. Could you check this dish?
Could you tell me if the service charge is included?

Good evening, and welcome to The Garden Table. Thank you for calling about tonight's menu. Let me tell you about our specials. To start, the soup of the day is a warm tomato and basil, which is also vegetarian. For the main course, we have a grilled salmon with a side of roasted vegetables, and our steak, which you can order rare, medium, or well-done. If you prefer something lighter, we also have a large garden salad and a vegetarian pasta dish. Please note that all of our dishes can be prepared without nuts, so if you are allergic, just let your waiter know and we will take care of it. For dessert, the kitchen has prepared a homemade apple pie and a chocolate cake. We are open until eleven, and we also offer takeout if you would rather eat at home. One more thing: a service charge of ten percent is added to every table, so there is no need to leave extra. We look forward to seeing you tonight. Thank you, and have a wonderful evening.

Hi Tuca, it is me again. I just had dinner at that new restaurant I told you about, and I have to tell you everything. The menu was huge, so it took me a while to order. I started with the tomato soup, which was lovely, and then I had the salmon for my main course. My friend ordered the steak well-done, and she said it was perfect. The waiter was so polite. When I asked if the pasta was vegetarian, he checked with the kitchen right away, because I have a friend who is allergic to nuts. The only small problem was the bill at the end. They added a service charge, and at first we thought it was a mistake, so we had a little complaint, but the manager explained it kindly and it was fine. Oh, and the best part: they do takeout too, so next time we can order a dish and eat at the farm. You really have to go. When you do, would you mind taking a photo of the dessert for me? Talk soon. Bye.

First, Tuca read the menu and chose a course to start with. Then she called the waiter over and asked if the pasta dish was vegetarian. After that, she ordered her steak well-done and asked him to bring some water. Next, when the food arrived, she had a small complaint because one dish was cold, and the waiter changed it right away. Finally, she asked for the bill and noticed a service charge was already included.
